chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No. 1725 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For orders on M.A 15339/16 19.12.2016. Mr. Noor Ahmed alias Rabbani, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. -.-.-. Today, statement alongwith parawise comments has been filed on behalf of police officials, while denying the contents of petition, respondent No.1 (Senior Superintendent of Police, Shaheed Benazirabad) has categorically stated that police officials will conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and if the petitioners approach the concerned officials, a requisite legal protection within parameters of law will be provided to petitioners. This petition is disposed of with the above observation and with further directions that petitioners will file a complaint before the Senior Superintendent of Police, Shaheed Benazirabad, who will take action on such complaint accordingly. Respondents No.3 and 4, the concerned SHOs of P.Ss Sarhari and Khadhar, respectively, are further directed to discharge their functions strictly in accordance with law without siding with private respondents and to provide protection to the petitioners if they are approached with such a request by petitioners, but within parameters of law. It is further directed that no harassment will be caused to the petitioners in any manner whatsoever. JUDGE Ali Haider
